overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through the vibrant countryside of Toussaint. The journey progresses from open fields through a stone gate, past scenic valley overlooks, and into a medieval village with Beauclair Palace visible on the hillside.

agents.ego_description: riding horse following a companion along a dirt track toward the stone gate

notable_agents.action: companion rider on horseback leading the way ahead through the gate

winding dirt trail through grassy countryside
large gothic castle visible on the distant hillside
scattered mature oak trees lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a horse rider approaching a stone archway gate. The camera passes through the gate into open countryside, with rolling green hills and a distant castle visible under bright afternoon sun.

segments.scene_description: Riding through open countryside along a dirt trail bordered by stone walls and wooden fences. The castle becomes more prominent on the right as the path winds through rolling terrain with mountain vistas.

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to a cobblestone bridge offering valley views before descending toward the village. Beauclair Castle dominates the right side of the frame, growing larger as the rider approaches the village outskirts with colorful houses appearing on the left.

entering narrower stone-paved thoroughfare between village buildings

winding dirt street between closely packed buildings

segments.scene_description: Riding through the village center with stone buildings lining both sides of the narrow street. The castle looms large on the right as the camera navigates past other riders and pedestrians, transitioning from open countryside to enclosed village architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, sun-drenched countryside of Toussaint into the enclosed architecture of a medieval village. It begins by following a horse rider through a stone archway gate, emerging into a landscape of rolling green hills under a bright afternoon sun. As the rider proceeds along a dirt trail bordered by stone walls and wooden fences, the distant castle on the right becomes increasingly prominent against a backdrop of mountain vistas. The scene then shifts as the path transitions onto a cobblestone bridge overlooking a wide valley before descending toward the village outskirts, where colorful houses appear on the left and the castle looms larger. Finally, the camera navigates through the narrow village center, moving past pedestrians and other riders between stone buildings that replace the open terrain.
